use_codes.desc: MANAGEMENT OF HEAVY MENSTRUAL BLEEDING ASSOCIATED WITH UTERINE LEIOMYOMAS (FIBROIDS)
MANAGEMENT OF HEAVY MENSTRUAL BLEEDING ASSOCIATED WITH UTERINE LEIOMYOMAS (FIBROIDS) USING 300 MG ELAGOLIX WHILE CO-ADMINISTERING OMEPRAZOLE

indications.text:
ORIAHNNis indicated for the management of heavy menstrual bleeding associated with uterine
leiomyomas (fibroids)in premenopausal women.
Limitation of Use:
Use of ORIAHNNshould be limited to 24 months due to the risk of continued bone loss,which
may not be reversible[see Dosage and Administration (2....
